examples: We all have things we wish we'd said, moments we'd like to revisit and reenact.
Some of the curious bystanders cheer: how wonderful to reenact Yahweh's incomparable creation!
The key lies in our reactions - how we reenact, or restructure internally, what others say and do.
Usually speakers will have a time where individual members, usually new members, have their photograph taken and sort of reenact the swearing-in.
Republicans should resist the move to reenact subsidies and controls.
